message:
Return typed `KeepAlive` from `OpCtx::io_executor()` (#5853)

## Summary

- Change `OpCtx::io_executor()` to return
`folly::Executor::KeepAlive<folly::IOExecutor>` instead of
`folly::Executor::KeepAlive<>`
- Templatize `ProfilingExecutor` on the base class so that
`ProfilingExecutor<folly::IOExecutor>` also satisfies the `IOExecutor`
interface
- Add `ProfilingIOExecutor` subclass that forwards `getEventBase()`
